title: Use Cases
summary: The applied side of the atlas: where confidential compute changes product design across AI, trading, payments, analytics, consumer apps, and other privacy-sensitive workflows.

bodySections.title: Pattern over hype
bodySections.body: Use Cases organizes the ecosystem around recurring product patterns rather than isolated examples. That makes it easier to see where Arcium repeatedly adds value and where confidentiality is only a nice-to-have.

bodySections.title: What good examples look like
bodySections.body: Strong use cases have a clear reason for protecting inputs, a meaningful downside to transparent execution, and a believable route from confidential infrastructure to user-visible value.

bodySections.title: How to use this category
bodySections.body: Move between these articles and the ecosystem directory when you want to compare theory with implementation. The guide should tell you why a category matters; the builder examples should show how that thesis appears in practice.

description: The product categories where confidentiality materially changes what can be built.
